etymology.description: 氏(氏) (shì, "clan; bowing figure") + 一 -> a bowing figure or tree root -> 氐(氐)
etymology.interpretation: The character 氐(氐) (dǐ) depicts a bowing figure or the root of a tree, with the addition of a horizontal line or point below the character 氏(氏) (shì, "clan; bowing figure"), suggesting the foundation or base, which connects to its use in indicating something basic or fundamental.

examples.chinese: 氣氛有些沉悶(氣氛有些沉悶)。
她的姓氏是氐(她的姓氏是氐)。
這個符號在古代文獻中出現過(這個符號在古代文獻中出現過)。
examples.pinyin: Zhège fúhào zài gǔdài wénxiàn zhōng chūxiànguò.
examples.english: This symbol appeared in ancient texts.
